title: Astrocytes Roles
script_summary: A concise exploration of the vital roles astrocytes play in our brains.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about astrocytes roles than social media does.
Astrocytes are star-shaped cells in your brain, but they do way more than just look pretty.
They regulate blood flow, support neurons, and maintain the blood-brain barrier.
Studies show astrocytes can even influence your mood and cognition by releasing chemicals.
But remember, research is ongoing. Their full potential is still a mystery.
